tools.description: Retrieve the current repository index metadata, including file count, symbol count, chunk count, and the exact timestamp when the repository was last indexed. Use first to check whether the local index exists and is fresh enough before calling search, symbol, or graph tools. This is read-only and only inspects repository metadata.
tools.name: repo_status

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Repo Status

tools.description: List all indexed files within the repository. Returns metadata such as relative path, size in bytes, and language. Useful for codebase structure discovery. Use for broad repository inventory and pagination over indexed paths; use search_files when you already have a keyword or path fragment. This is read-only and returns indexed data only.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

offset.description: Number of matching files to skip. Defaults to 0.

tools.name: list_files

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku List Files

tools.description: List all programming languages detected and indexed in the repository, alongside support status. Use for a quick language/support overview before choosing language-specific investigation paths. This is read-only and does not rescan the repository.
tools.name: list_languages

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku List Languages

tools.description: List or search indexed code symbols (such as classes, structs, functions, and interfaces) by name. Supports substring filtering. Use to browse or substring-filter the symbol table; use search_symbols for fuzzy ranking and get_definition when you need one symbol body. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of symbols to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

offset.description: Number of matching symbols to skip. Defaults to 0.

query.description: Substring query to filter symbol names. If omitted, returns all symbols.

tools.name: list_symbols

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku List Symbols

tools.description: Search indexed code symbols by name using exact or fuzzy matching. Essential for finding definitions. Use when an agent has an approximate symbol name and needs ranked candidates; use list_symbols for inventory and get_definition for a resolved definition. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

offset.description: Number of matching symbols to skip. Defaults to 0.

query.description: Fuzzy or exact search query for symbol names.

tools.name: search_symbols

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Search Symbols

tools.description: Detect high-level architectural components and directories in the repository based on file layouts. Use to infer architectural components from directories when no policy-specific answer is required. Use architecture_policy_check for enforced dependency rules. This is read-only.
tools.name: detect_architecture

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Detect Architecture

tools.description: Show the configured or inferred boundaries between architectural components, useful to understand import constraints. Use to inspect component boundary configuration before explaining or checking violations. Use architecture_violations for legacy detected issues and architecture_policy_check for policy-backed edge evaluation. This is read-only.
tools.name: architecture_boundaries

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Architecture Boundaries

tools.description: Report any import or boundary violations that deviate from the defined codebase architecture rules. Use for a quick legacy boundary violation report; use architecture_policy_check when repository policy TOML and indexed dependency edges should be authoritative. This is read-only.
tools.name: architecture_violations

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Architecture Violations

tools.description: Validate the resolved repository architecture policy, or an explicit policy TOML path, without evaluating indexed graph edges. Use before architecture_policy_check when editing or debugging policy TOML syntax and component resolution. It validates policy shape only and does not evaluate graph edges.

path.description: Optional repository-relative or absolute path to a standalone architecture policy TOML file.

tools.name: architecture_policy_validate

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Architecture Policy Validate

tools.description: Evaluate repository-owned architecture policy dependency rules against indexed import, reference, and call graph edges. Returns allowed, forbidden, and unknown edge counts with bounded unknown samples. Use to enforce architecture policy against indexed import/reference/call edges. Use architecture_policy_validate first for policy syntax errors and architecture_policy_explain for why a specific file or symbol matched. This is read-only.
tools.name: architecture_policy_check

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Architecture Policy Check

tools.description: Explain architecture policy component, public API boundary, and exemption evidence for one indexed file, symbol, or the whole repository. Use after a policy check to explain component membership, public API boundaries, or exemptions for one file, one symbol, or the whole repo. This is read-only and does not change policy.

scope.description: Use `repo` to return repository-wide public API boundary findings.

symbol.description: Indexed symbol name or qualified name to explain.

tools.name: architecture_policy_explain

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Architecture Policy Explain

tools.description: Perform a lexical BM25 search across indexed code chunks. Set mode=graph to search indexed graph-node identifiers, qualified names, routes, config keys, and properties. Use for lexical BM25 code search when exact identifiers, terms, routes, or config keys are known. Prefer semantic_search for conceptual queries, hybrid_search when both lexical and semantic evidence are needed, and regex_search for exact patterns. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of search results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

mode.description: Search mode. Defaults to code; graph searches indexed graph-node documents.

offset.description: Number of matching search results to skip. Defaults to 0.

query.description: The search query containing terms, code patterns, identifiers, graph entity names, routes, or config keys.

tools.name: search_code

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Search Code

tools.description: Search indexed file names and contents for specific keywords or file path patterns. Set mode=graph to search graph-node documents through the same index. Use when the target is a file path, filename, or file-content keyword rather than a symbol. Prefer list_files for inventory, search_code for code snippets, and regex_search for precise line pattern matching. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

mode.description: Search mode. Defaults to code; graph searches indexed graph-node documents.

offset.description: Number of matching search results to skip. Defaults to 0.

query.description: The search query to match against file paths, file contents, or graph-node documents.

tools.name: search_files

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Search Files

tools.description: Search indexed code using a regular expression pattern. Returns exact line matching snippets. Use for exact regular-expression line matches after lexical or semantic search narrows the area. Prefer search_code for ranked keyword search and structural_search for syntax-shaped queries. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

offset.description: Number of matching search results to skip. Defaults to 0.

pattern.description: A valid regular expression pattern to match against source code.

tools.name: regex_search

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Regex Search

tools.description: Report the current status, readiness, and staleness of the local semantic vector index. Use before semantic_search or hybrid_search to confirm the local vector index is present and fresh. This is read-only and does not build embeddings.
tools.name: semantic_status

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Semantic Status

tools.description: Search the local semantic vector index using natural language queries to retrieve conceptually related code snippets. Use for natural-language concepts when exact identifiers are unknown. Prefer search_code for exact terms and hybrid_search when results need both semantic recall and lexical precision. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

offset.description: Number of matching search results to skip. Defaults to 0.

query.description: Natural language search query expressing the concept or functionality you are looking for.

tools.name: semantic_search

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Semantic Search

tools.description: Perform a hybrid search combining lexical BM25 candidates and semantic vector candidates to produce ranked, context-rich results. Use as the default investigative search when both words and concepts matter. Prefer search_code for deterministic lexical matches and semantic_search for concept-only exploration. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

offset.description: Number of matching search results to skip. Defaults to 0.

query.description: The search query to match lexically and conceptually against the codebase.

tools.name: hybrid_search

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Hybrid Search

tools.description: Run a hybrid search and return detailed, explainable ranking scores and evidence for the top retrieved code snippets. Use when a search result must be justified with score components and evidence before relying on it in a plan. Prefer hybrid_search when explanations are unnecessary. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of explained results. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The search query to analyze and explain results for.

tools.name: explain_search_result

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Explain Search Result

tools.description: Perform a structural search across both symbol trees and code chunks to find structural matching syntax. Use for syntax or structure-shaped discovery across symbol trees and chunks. Prefer regex_search for literal text patterns and get_definition for a known symbol. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of structural matches to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The query to run against structure trees and chunk indices.

tools.name: structural_search

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Structural Search

tools.description: Retrieve the definition location, file range, and body of a symbol (function, class, struct, trait, module) by its name. Use after resolving a symbol name to retrieve its defining range and body. Prefer search_symbols for candidate discovery and get_symbol_context when surrounding references and documentation are needed. This is read-only.

query.description: The exact or partial name of the symbol to find the definition for.

tools.name: get_definition

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Get Definition

tools.description: Retrieve all references, usages, and call-sites of a given symbol throughout the indexed codebase. Use to find usages of a resolved symbol across the index. Prefer get_callers for caller-only relationships and impact_analysis for broader file-level blast radius. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of references to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The name of the symbol to find references for.

tools.name: get_references

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Get References

tools.description: Find all implementations of a given interface, trait, or abstract class in the repository. Use for traits, interfaces, abstract classes, and protocols where implementation sites matter. Prefer get_references for all usages and get_definition for the declaration itself. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of implementations to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The name of the interface or trait.

tools.name: get_implementations

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Get Implementations

tools.description: Find all parent functions, methods, or modules that call the target symbol. Use to trace inbound calls to a function or method. Prefer get_references for all usages and dependency_path when you need a route between two nodes. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of callers to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The name of the symbol whose callers you want to find.

tools.name: get_callers

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Get Callers

tools.description: Find all functions, methods, or symbols called by the target symbol. Use to trace outbound calls made by a function or method. Prefer module_dependencies for file/module neighbors and dependency_path for a specific connection. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of callees to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

query.description: The name of the symbol whose calls you want to trace.

tools.name: get_callees

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Get Callees

tools.description: Retrieve the comprehensive context of a symbol, including definition details, range, file context, and documentation if available. Use when an agent needs a richer single-symbol bundle than get_definition provides, including file context and docs when indexed. This is read-only.
tools.name: get_symbol_context

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Get Symbol Context

tools.description: Trace the shortest dependency or reference path between two files or symbols, illustrating how they are connected. Use to explain how two files or symbols are connected through indexed dependencies. Prefer module_dependencies for local neighbors and impact_analysis for downstream blast radius. This is read-only.

from.description: The starting node path or symbol name.

to.description: The target node path or symbol name.

tools.name: dependency_path

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Dependency Path

tools.description: Analyze the potential blast radius of a change to a file. Identifies downstream dependents, callers, and related test files. Use before editing a file to estimate downstream dependents, callers, related tests, and policy impact. Prefer find_tests_for_change when only validation targets are needed. This is read-only.

path.description: The repository-relative path of the file to analyze.

tools.name: impact_analysis

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Impact Analysis

tools.description: Look up bounded commit provenance for exactly one repository-relative path or indexed symbol. Returns first-seen, last-touched, recent touches, confidence, and explicit uncertainty. Use when authorship timing or first/last-touch evidence is needed for exactly one path or symbol. Prefer churn_analysis for hotspot metrics and ownership_lookup for maintainers. This is read-only and reports uncertainty.

limit.description: Maximum recent touches to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

symbol.description: Exact symbol name, qualified name, or symbol ID to inspect.

tools.name: history_provenance_lookup

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku History Provenance Lookup

tools.description: Return materialized churn and hotspot stats for exactly one repository-relative path, module directory, or indexed symbol. Includes all-time, 30-day, 90-day, recency-weighted, hotspot score, confidence, and uncertainty without scanning raw commit history. Use to identify hotspots for one path, module, or symbol using materialized git statistics. Prefer history_provenance_lookup for commit provenance and history_similar_changes for prior change examples. This is read-only.

module.description: Repository-relative module or directory path to inspect.

symbol.description: Exact symbol name, qualified name, or symbol ID to inspect.

tools.name: churn_analysis

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Churn Analysis

tools.description: Retrieve ranked similar historical commits using task text, paths, symbols, co-change neighborhoods, churn, and commit metadata. Returns evidence and confidence for each hit. Use during planning to find prior commits related to a task, path, or symbol. Prefer churn_analysis for risk scoring and ownership_lookup for reviewer ownership. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum similar changes to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

symbol.description: Single symbol name, qualified name, or symbol ID to match.

symbols.description: Symbol names, qualified names, or symbol IDs to match.

tools.name: history_similar_changes

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku History Similar Changes

tools.description: Resolve ranked owner suggestions for one repository-relative path from CODEOWNERS, persisted local git history, and secondary repo memory facts. Returns source breakdown, confidence, staleness, component matches, and explicit uncertainty. Use to identify likely owners for one path from CODEOWNERS, git history, and memory facts. Prefer reviewer_suggestions when choosing reviewers for a proposed change. This is read-only.
tools.name: ownership_lookup

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Ownership Lookup

tools.description: Suggest ranked reviewers for one repository-relative path from stored review evidence when available, otherwise explicit ownership and git-author inference. Returns source type, rationale, confidence, availability, and fallback fields. Use when a change needs human reviewers and a path is known. Prefer ownership_lookup for ownership evidence without reviewer ranking. This is read-only.
tools.name: reviewer_suggestions

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Reviewer Suggestions

tools.description: List the direct dependency graph neighbors (imports and dependents) of a given file or symbol node. Use to inspect direct dependency neighbors for one file or symbol. Prefer dependency_path for a route between two nodes and architecture_policy_check for rule violations. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum number of neighbors to return. Defaults to 20, capped at 100.

node.description: The file path or symbol node identifier.

tools.name: module_dependencies

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Module Dependencies

tools.description: Assemble a comprehensive, token-efficient context pack of files, symbols, and tests relevant to a natural language task description. Use before planning or editing to gather relevant files, symbols, tests, history, and policy evidence for a natural-language task. Prefer build_compressed_context when prompt budget is tight. This is read-only.

format.description: The output format of the context pack.

limit.description: Maximum number of context results to include. Defaults to 20.

task.description: A natural language description of the task to gather context for.

tools.name: build_context_pack

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Build Context Pack

tools.description: Build a reversible compressed context pack with references and handles. Allows retrieving original snippets later to save prompt space. Use when a context pack is needed but prompt budget is constrained; retrieve_context can expand handles later. This writes reusable context handles under the repository .ok data directory.

limit.description: Maximum number of context items. Defaults to 20.

task.description: A natural language description of the task.

tools.name: build_compressed_context

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Build Compressed Context

tools.description: Retrieve the original uncompressed source code snippet associated with a compressed context handle. Use only with handles returned by build_compressed_context to recover original snippets. Prefer build_context_pack for a fresh task-level context bundle. This is read-only.

handle.description: The handle ID returned by build_compressed_context.

tools.name: retrieve_context

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Retrieve Context

tools.description: Generate an evidence-backed pre-edit plan for a task, including primary files to edit, expected impact, changed-line ranges, and recommended test targets. Use before editing to create an evidence-backed plan with expected files, ranges, impact, and tests. Prefer create_change_contract when the plan must be persisted and verified later. This is read-only.

limit.description: Maximum planning results to generate. Defaults to 20.

since.description: Optional git revision/range used with git diff --unified=0 to include changed files and line ranges in planning context.

task.description: A natural language description of the task or change to plan.

tools.name: plan_change

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Plan Change

tools.description: Create and optionally store a versioned change contract from a task or saved plan while preserving plan_change for backwards compatibility. Use when a plan needs a durable verification contract for later review or CI evidence. By default it writes a contract under .ok/contracts; set store=false for a transient contract.

limit.description: Maximum planning results to generate when task is provided. Defaults to 20.

plan.description: Inline PlanReport object used as the source plan.

plan_json.description: JSON-encoded PlanReport used as the source plan.

since.description: Optional git revision/range used with git diff --unified=0 when planning from task.

store.description: Persist the contract under .ok/contracts. Defaults to true.

task.description: Natural language task used to build a fresh plan before contract creation.

tools.name: create_change_contract

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Create Change Contract

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.description: Record a repository-scoped memory fact with metadata, entity links, and confidence parameters. Use only for durable, repository-scoped facts an agent should reuse later. It appends memory under repository storage; use search_memory to read existing facts first when unsure.

source.description: The source or tool that observed the fact. Defaults to 'mcp'.

limit.description: Maximum number of facts to return. Defaults to 20.

query.description: The search query to match against facts.

path.description: The repository-relative path of the file.

tools.description: Summarize the high-level architecture flows and directory boundaries within the repository. Use for a high-level narrative of repository flows and boundaries. Prefer architecture_policy_check for enforceable violations and summarize_architecture for structured architecture output. This is read-only.
tools.name: explain_flow

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Explain Flow

tools.description: Return a structured summary of the codebase architecture, including layer constraints and violation checks. Use for a structured architecture overview with layer constraints and violation checks. Prefer explain_flow for a narrative and architecture_policy_explain for file-level evidence. This is read-only.
tools.name: summarize_architecture

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Summarize Architecture

Prefer recommend_validation_plan when static checks, coverage, and broader validation steps are also needed. This is read-only.

Use before finalizing a change to choose tests, static checks, and coverage actions for one path. Prefer find_tests_for_change for test-only recommendations. This is read-only.

tools.name: recommend_validation_plan

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Review Patch

tools.description: Validate a patch plan against codebase boundaries and references to detect warnings. Use to check a patch plan against architecture boundaries and references before application. Prefer verify_change after a real diff exists. This is read-only.
tools.name: validate_patch

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Validate Patch

tools.description: Verify an actual diff or set of changed files against a saved pre-edit plan. Validates constraints and runs test commands. Use after edits to compare an actual diff or changed files against a saved plan. It may run configured validation commands when run_commands=true and may write attestations when write_attestation=true.

changed_files.description: List of repository-relative paths of changed files.

check_api_surface.description: Set true to detect public API additions, removals, and signature changes during verification.

check_dependency_delta.description: Set true to detect dependency graph deltas and flag forbidden dependency additions.

diff.description: The unified diff showing the actual changes.

plan.description: A JSON object containing the saved PlanReport.

plan_json.description: A JSON-encoded string representation of the PlanReport.

run_commands.description: Set true to execute the validation commands defined in the plan.

since_plan.description: Optional git revision/range used with git diff --unified=0 to derive changed files and diff input.

traceability_strict.description: Set true to reject supplied evidence references that are not present in the saved plan.

write_attestation.description: Set true with run_commands to persist validation attestations under .ok/contracts/validation.

tools.name: verify_change

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Verify Change

tools.description: Verify changed files or a diff against a stored or inline change contract. Stored contract ids append verification records to .ok/contracts. Use after edits to verify a diff against a stored or inline change contract. Stored contract ids append verification records under .ok/contracts, and command execution is opt-in via run_commands.

changed_files.description: List of repository-relative paths of changed files.

check_api_surface.description: Set true to detect public API additions, removals, and signature changes during verification.

check_dependency_delta.description: Set true to detect dependency graph deltas and flag forbidden dependency additions.

diff.description: The unified diff showing the actual changes.

run_commands.description: Set true to execute validation commands defined in the contract.

since_plan.description: Optional git revision/range used with git diff --unified=0 to derive changed files and diff input.

traceability_strict.description: Set true to reject supplied evidence references that are not present in the contract.

validation_attestations.description: Previously recorded validation attestations to replay during verification.

write_attestation.description: Set true with run_commands and a stored contract id to persist validation attestations.

tools.name: verify_change_contract

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Verify Change Contract

tools.description: Explain a contract verification report, including the decision, boundary failures, warnings, dependency deltas, validation attestations, and recommended tests. Use after verify_change_contract to translate a verification report into a decision, failures, warnings, and next tests. This is read-only.
tools.name: explain_verification

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Explain Verification

tools.description: Map a runtime stack trace to indexed source locations and file lines. Use when runtime stack trace text must be mapped to indexed source locations. Prefer find_errors_for_symbol when the symbol is known and recent stored failures are needed. This tool is read-only and returns disabled status when runtime integration is not configured.

stacktrace.description: The stack trace string to analyze.

tools.name: map_stacktrace_to_code

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Map Stacktrace To Code

tools.description: Retrieve recent runtime errors and stack traces associated with a given symbol. Use to look up recent stored runtime errors for one symbol. Prefer map_stacktrace_to_code for ad hoc stack traces and find_recent_failures for incident inventory. This tool is read-only and returns disabled status when runtime integration is not configured.

query.description: The symbol name to look up errors for.

tools.name: find_errors_for_symbol

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Find Errors For Symbol

tools.description: Retrieve a list of recent runtime failures, errors, or incidents recorded in the repository. Use to list recent stored runtime failures before debugging. Prefer find_errors_for_symbol for a specific symbol. This tool is read-only and returns disabled status when runtime integration is not configured.

limit.description: Maximum number of failure entries to retrieve. Defaults to 20.

tools.name: find_recent_failures

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Find Recent Failures

tools.description: Retrieve the versioned schema defining the supported graph node types, edge types, and query properties available in the repository's structural evidence graph. Use before query_evidence_graph to learn available graph node types, edge types, and properties. This is read-only and does not query graph data.
tools.name: get_evidence_schema

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Get Evidence Schema

tools.description: Execute a read-only graph query using a constrained subset of Cypher. Call get_evidence_schema first to see available node/edge types. (Note: The DSL is NOT full Cypher). Output rows are JSON arrays aligned with the user-selected variables in `columns`. Use for advanced read-only evidence queries after inspecting get_evidence_schema. The query language is a constrained Cypher-like DSL, not full Cypher; prefer purpose-built tools when available.

limit.description: Maximum rows to return. Defaults to 50, capped at 100.

offset.description: Number of matching rows to skip. Defaults to 0.

query.description: The graph query string to execute.

tools.name: query_evidence_graph

outputSchema.description: The MCP structuredContent payload returned by this Open Kioku tool. Most tools return JSON objects; tools with a format parameter may return Markdown or TOON strings.

tools.title: Open Kioku Query Evidence Graph
